data.title: Pure Hockey Expands to Over 100 Stores with Acquisition of Perani's Hockey World
data.description: Pure Hockey, a prominent retailer in the U.S., has reaffirmed its dedication to serving players and families nationwide with its recent move. On April 28, 2026, Pure Hockey revealed the acquisition of Perani's Hockey World, solidifying its position as the top destination for hockey enthusiasts. This strategic decision marks an important milestone for Pure Hockey as it continues to expand its offerings in equipment, apparel, and accessories, further enhancing the experience for customers.

data.title: Insilico's Rentosertib Inhalation Solution Receives IND Clearance for the World's First AI-Driven Candidate to Enter Direct-to-Lung Clinical Study
data.description: Rentosertib has shown promising results in Phase IIa trials for the treatment of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF), demonstrating good tolerability and dose-dependent efficacy improvements. The oral formulation has a favorable pharmacokinetic profile. Following these results, the inhalation solution of Rentosertib has obtained Investigational New Drug (IND) clearance from the China Drug Evaluation (CDE). This inhalation solution is specially formulated for targeted delivery to the lungs.

data.title: LG Display's 27-inch DFR Gaming OLED panel wins SID's 'Display of the Year'
data.description: LG Display, a top display technology innovator based in Seoul, South Korea, recently revealed that their cutting-edge 27-inch Gaming OLED panel, featuring 540/720Hz Dynamic Frequency & Resolution (DFR), has secured the prestigious title of "Display of the Year" bestowed by the Society for Information Display. This recognition underscores the remarkable capabilities of LG Display's gaming panel, solidifying its position as a standout product in the industry.

data.title: Mesoblast Achieves Patient Recruitment Target in Pivotal Phase 3 Trial for Chronic Low Back Pain
data.description: In New York on April 28, 2026, Mesoblast Limited, a global leader in allogeneic cellular medicines for inflammatory diseases, shared that its pivotal Phase 3 clinical trial assessing rexlemestrocel-L for treating chronic low back pain (CLBP) linked to degenerative disc disease has successfully met its patient recruitment goal. This achievement represents a key advancement in Mesoblast’s strategy for bringing rexlemestrocel-L, its exclusive allogeneic stromal cell therapy aimed at addressing inflammatory mechanisms triggering disc degeneration, to market. The company’s stock is traded on Nasdaq under MESO and on ASX under MSB.

data.title: Syntec Optics (Nasdaq: OPTX) Announces Pricing of $20 Million Underwritten Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Syntec Optics Holdings, Inc. disclosed the pricing details of its underwritten public offering. The offering consists of 2,857,142 shares of common stock at a price of $7.00 per share. Syntec Optics is recognized for its innovative technology catering to defense tech and various robust end-markets. This move is poised to potentially bolster the Company's financial standing and market position.

data.title: InnoCare Announces First Patient Dosed in Phase III Trial of Orelabrutinib for SLE
data.description: A recent Phase II clinical trial has shown that Orelabrutinib, the first BTKi of its kind, has displayed notable effectiveness in managing Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE). SLE is a condition that impacts approximately 8 million individuals globally.
